feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Extensibility
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Extensibility Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Notification when GR(Goods Receipt ) created within Fiori app
entry.content:
Hi Team,

When GR(Goods Receipt) is created user should receive a notification within fiori app(s/4 hana public cloud).

Please guide me.

Thanks,

Vani.

entry.title: Custom field and logics
entry.content:
Hello, 

I have added a custom field using the "Custom Fields and Logic" app in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud under the Customer: General Information business context. The field is created and published successfully.

Now, I want this custom field to appear in the Customer Master Data Template specifically in the Tax tab. I am unsure about the following:

  1. How do I define the path for this custom field so that it appears in the Tax tab of the Customer Master Data Template?

  2. Do I need to use a different business context ?

  3. Are there any additional steps required to ensure this field is placed in the correct section and has the intended impact?

Best Regards,

Tehreem Fatima

entry.title: Custom field with multiline in S4 public cloud-key user extensibility
entry.content:
Hi,

I have created a custom field with length as 500 characters in S4 public cloud using key user extensibility. However when I enabled the field in SAP Gui screen, I am getting a single line text input field. I need this to be multiline textbox as 500 characters are long. 

Can some one advise how to create multi line custom text field using key user extensibility in S4 Cloud or S4 public cloud. 

 

Thanks

entry.title: Create Custom fields to item layout in PR & PO in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
We have a S/4HANA public cloud and have a requirement to create a custom field in the item layout in PR and PO. Can you please suggest any approach?

We know how to create custom fields in item details panel. This is working fine but requirement is to create custom field at the line-item layout where we see all details like material, quantity, plant, delivery date etc.

entry.title: While debugging in Eclipse, I get an error “no authorization to change variable 'xxxxxxxx'”
entry.content:
I am implementing and testing custom logic on the extension point “MM_PUR_S4_PO_MODIFY_HEADER” in S/4HANA PUBLIC CLOUD.
I want to change SY-SUBRC and variable values during debugging in Eclipse, but I get the error

“no authorization to change variable ‘xxxxxxxx’” and cannot change them.
I have assigned the business roles “Extensibility Specialist:
BR_EXTENSIBILITY_SPEC” and “Developer: BR_DEVELOPER” to the PUBLIC CLOUD user ID.
Please let me know if you know of a solution.

entry.title: Missing Records in custom CDS view for specific filter value
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I'm facing an issue in one of my custom cds views. When I execute the CDS and apply a filter on the person field, the view returns correct results for most values, However, for some specific person, no data is returned.

There is no syntax or runtime error, it simply returns empty data for those cases.

Any pointers or suggestions on what to check would be appreciated.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Profit Center Assignment in Customer/Supplier in SAP S/4HANA CLOUD PUBLIC EDITION
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We have a business requirement where one Supplier or Customer may be debited or credited directly, and the corresponding entry is posted to another Supplier or Customer.

Currently, the "Post General Journal Entries" app does not support the selection of Customer or Supplier accounts, which limits our ability to post these transactions directly through journal entries.

As a workaround, we are using the "Clear Incoming Payment" and "Clear Outgoing Payment" applications to perform these transactions. However, in these apps, we are unable to assign a Profit Center, which is essential for our internal reporting and profitability analysis.

We would appreciate your guidance on the following points

  1. Is there any way to allow Customer and Supplier accounts to be posted together using a journal entry app?

  2. How can we assign Profit Centers in these clearing scenarios, or is there an alternative recommended approach?

We look forward to your suggestions.

Regards,

Prince Ebi

entry.title: CDS for list of confirmed customer bank accounts
entry.content:
Hi experts.

In SAP S4HANA Public Cloud I need to create CDS view that provides a list of confirmed customer bank accounts for a certain period.  This is confirmed by application "Confirm Customer List".

But I don't know which basic CDS I can use.

A another solution would be to also use the API, but I don't know which provide the necessary data.

Can anyone help me which CDS/API can be used and they are released for development ?

Thanks,
Roman

entry.title: Invoice document - change/move of the positions
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I need to change the positions of some objects, for example sold-to party data, in the invoice document and create a customer specific solution. In the past it was possible to do this with the help of "Adobe Livecycle Designer". Unfortunately I found this tool just for SAP GUI use and I need a solution for SAP S/4HANA Fiori Public Cloud. 

Hopefully some of you know this problem and can help me to find a solution or give me some information where to download a version of the "Adobe Livecycle Designer" for SAP Fiori. It would be great if you have some other options to change/move fields in the invoice document.

Thanks a lot!

entry.title: How to consume a RAP Behavior Event for R_JOURNAL- SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition ( ABAP CLOUD )
entry.content:
Hello Experts

How can I consume a standard event of the Behavior Definition finance object “R_JOURNALENTRYTP” locally in the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition - In-App Developer Extensibility system ?

Or how you could detect the create or modify events of a financial accounting entry. To run an abap cloud development in parallel or by background job ?. Such a process contains commits and updates other objects.

Currently, in the Custom Logic App I have not been able to find a BADI that meets my requirement and allows me to run an abap development in parallel at the time of a creation or modification of an accounting entry.

Please support

Best regards,Antony Pantoja

entry.title: import outbound delivery through the Excel
entry.content:
Hi ,

I create a sales order , and  I should create the outbound delivery base on the sales order through the APP Create Outbound Delivery with Order Reference.

But my question is : the sales order have hundreds of lines , I just need part of it . If in APP Create Outbound Delivery with Order Reference , I have to select in the SAP but cannot set flexible combinations of filtering criteria . This leads to low work efficiency .

SO I want to download the sales order to the Excel , select in the Excel , and import outbound delivery through the Excel . Is there a way ?

entry.title: Loop AT item table of custom bo
entry.content:
I want to loop the item table(Composition) of custom bo from Root(AlloyCode) Before Save logic . How can i do it? Is there any code sample?

This is my custom bo structure.

Best Regards,

Khaing Zin

entry.title: I want to run a job in ADT for a Custom Object created in S/4HANA Public cloud
entry.content:
Hello everyone.

I want to run a job in ADT for a Custom Object created in S/4HANA Public cloud.

I have created a custom business object in S/4HANA Public Cloud and generated Odata.
I am trying to check the steps to create a Job in ADT (Eclipse) and execute the custom business object with the help of the following SAP HELP.

https://help.sap.com/docs/btp/sap-business-technology-platform/application-jobs?locale=en-US
I was able to create the Job Catalog and Job Template. However, I do not know how to code the interface IF_APJ_RT_RUN to call Odata and execute the custom business object.

I also refer to this blog, but after creating Service Consumption, when I create a new Class and code it, I get the error “Implementation missing for method” and cannot proceed.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blog-posts-by-sap/how-to-call-a-remote-odata-service-from-the-trial-version-of-sap-cloud/ba-p/13411535

If anyone knows of a solution or coding, I would appreciate it.

entry.title: How to consume RAP BO Events of the Document Info Record (DIR) locally in SAP Public Cloud?
entry.content:
Hello everybody,

actually i am trying to consume a event (locally) of the document info record (DIR) in SAP Public Cloud embedded steampunk. In the Accelerator Hub there are some listed events for the DIR. However i cannot find the Business Object Interface for the DIR with the corresponding events. 

 

Does that mean that the events cannot be consumed at all altough they are listed and released?

 

 

Is there any way to consume this events locally in SAP Public Cloud?

entry.title: Can we able to edit standard CDS in public cloud?
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Can we able to edit standard CDS view in public cloud?

Thanks,

Nirojan

entry.title: Re: SAP Collection Management Extention to the Program
entry.content:
Hi Nikhil,

for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition you can find respective BAdIs in the SAP Business Accelerator Hub, at hub.sap.com here. You may need to assess project management capabilities and enhancement capabilities fo S/4HANA Cloud on its own merits: As this is not the same product as ECC / ERP 6 it may not work in the same ways and may not have programs known or accessible by the same names. Please refer to the SAP Help for S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, Extensibility for Enterprise Projects page to learn more.

As you inquire about S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, you may want to use th respective tags, too. I added some as samples for your future consideration. 

If this response helped you get your question addressed, please mark accordingly.

entry.title: Inconsistencies Between Quality and Production Environments in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi SAP Experts,

We’re encountering critical inconsistencies between the Quality and Production environments in our SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud system, particularly affecting payment processes. These discrepancies are impacting our client’s daily operations, and we would appreciate your insights:

  1. Payment Advice Output Issue:
    Despite correctly configuring the Output Parameter Determination (OPD) for payment advice forms, the Automatic Payment Program in Production continues to trigger and send an outdated form that is not included in the OPD settings. The new form, which is correctly configured and active in OPD, is being ignored. This issue does not occur in the Quality environment.

  2. Payment File Format Discrepancy:
    In CBC, each payment method is assigned a specific Payment Medium Format under “Set Up Payment Methods for Each Country/Region.” However, in Production, the Manage Payment Media app generates payment files using a single, incorrect format across all methods, ignoring the CBC configuration.

Has anyone experienced similar issues or can offer guidance on:

  • Why OPD settings might be bypassed in Production?
  • How to ensure CBC payment method configurations are correctly reflected in Production?

Any help in diagnosing and resolving these inconsistencies would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Open Journal Entry App in a New Tab from P&L or G/L Reports
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

In SAP Fiori, when we view Profit & Loss statements or G/L line items and click on a journal entry number, the system opens the related app (e.g., Manage Journal Entries or Journal Entry Analyzer) in the same tab, replacing the current screen.

This is inconvenient for users who need to compare or switch between the report and the journal.

Is there a way to configure SAP Fiori Launchpad to open these apps in a new tab?

Based on what I've found so far, it seems that there is no standard way to open a new tab in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Edition.

entry.title: Create new DME format under Format Tree UMS1 - S4Hana Public Cloud Edition
entry.content:
We have a requirement for the XML output from the Fiori app 'Advance Return for Tax on Sales/Purchases'. As I understand, only the Tree type UMS1 can be used. 

How can I create a new Format tree under UMS1? In the Legacy system, it was very straight forward as you only needed transaction code DMEE. I do not seem to find anything similar in the Public Cloud Edition. 

Please let me know the steps, or if it is not possible, and we should open an SAP note.

I have attached some relevant screenshots from the mentioned Fiori app.

Regards, and thank you.

entry.title: Enhancement in VF01 SAP public cloud
entry.content:
Hi Team , 

I am new to public cloud development having doubt in implementing enhancement in VF01 SAP public cloud 

requirement is to store the invoice values into a custom table and and send to the invoice details to external API.

how to achieve this .

Do we have to create a BADI or any exist available in Public cloud as in ECC or S4HANA system

or do we have any other alternatives?

please suggest.

Guru
